title: Senior Plant Manager at Samsung India Electronics

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Samsung India Electronics
jsonLd.description:
Samsung India Electronics has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Samsung India Electronics:
Samsung India Electronics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics!
